title: SecurityLevel
description: Details of an issue level security item.

description.description: The description of the issue level security item.

id.description: The ID of the issue level security item.

isDefault.description: Whether the issue level security item is the default.

issueSecuritySchemeId.description: The ID of the issue level security scheme.

name.description: The name of the issue level security item.

self.description: The URL of the issue level security item.
